pathway_cards_start_here.name: Three Ways to Enter the Garden

settings.title: Enter the Garden
settings.description: One-time event for those who want to try without commitment.
settings.features:
One-time 1.5 hour session
Connect with new people
Drinks & snacks included

settings.title: Regular classes
settings.description: A steady weekly rhythm for optimal learning and growth.
settings.features:
10 weekly 1.5 hour sessions
Community events & Rituals
Cover missed classes for free

settings.title: Weekly Practicas
settings.description: A relaxed space to practice, connect, and grow together.
settings.features:
Weekly 2.5 hour guided sessions
Open-level and double-role
Community-focused atmosphere

settings.heading: Three Ways to Enter the Garden
settings.subheading: Choose what feels right for where you are.
settings.price_footnote: * for students and anyone who is 28 years old or less
settings.help_text: Every dancer starts somewhere different. If you're not sure where you fit, we're happy to guide you personally.
settings.whatsapp_message: Hi! I'm not sure which option is right for me...
